data.title: Contract: ESCALATE_REVIEW signal emit/parse interface
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create contract document at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/escalate-review-signal.md defining the ESCALATE_REVIEW signal.

Signal Name: escalate_review
Emitter: code-reviewer-light, code-reviewer-standard, code-reviewer-deep-{correctness,verification,hygiene} (sonnet agents)
Parser: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md orchestrator (Step 4a — after reviewer return, before overlay dispatch)

Fields:
- escalate_review (optional array in reviewer-findings.json top-level)
- Each element: {finding_index: int (index into findings array), reason: string (why uncertain)}
- Empty array: valid (no escalation). Absent field: valid (no escalation). Null: invalid.

Example payload included. Note on deep-tier: escalation dedup happens AFTER opus synthesis, using the synthesized findings array indices.

Unit test exemption: Contract document with no conditional logic.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/escalate-review-signal.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/escalate-review-signal.md
- [ ] Contract contains required sections (Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Fields, Example)
  Verify: grep -q 'Signal Name' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/escalate-review-signal.md && grep -q 'Emitter' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/escalate-review-signal.md && grep -q 'Parser' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/escalate-review-signal.md
